title:
From plain to polished ✨ — a hallway transformed with resin art and decorative liquor bottles embedded under a crystal-clear epoxy layer 🍾🫧

A bold statement for modern interiors and luxury design lovers 🏡💎
(No drinking shown or promoted.)

Disclosure: This video includes AI-generated elements 🤖
Liquor note: Bottles are decorative elements sealed under epoxy; not intended to promote alcohol use 🚫🍸

prompt_text: A long, luxury hotel hallway with high ceilings, ornate molding, and warm sconce lighting. The center floor is recessed, forming a trough. Several men in casual uniforms or shirts line the sides. The floor transitions from empty to filled with hundreds of glass liquor bottles and liquid, eventually appearing as a glossy epoxy-like resin floor containing the bottles.

prompt_data.sceneDescription: A long, luxury hotel hallway with high ceilings, ornate molding, and warm sconce lighting. The center floor is recessed, forming a trough. Several men in casual uniforms or shirts line the sides. The floor transitions from empty to filled with hundreds of glass liquor bottles and liquid, eventually appearing as a glossy epoxy-like resin floor containing the bottles.

cinematography.mood: Chaotic and destructive, transitioning into a sense of satisfaction and craftsmanship.
cinematography.cameraShot: Low-angle, static long shot looking straight down the hallway towards a closed door.

actions: Groups of men simultaneously dump crates of assorted glass bottles into the hallway trough.
Men pour large quantities of clear and amber liquid over the shattered and whole bottles.
Workers use large squeegees to level the liquid across the bottle-filled floor.
A worker uses a propane torch to remove bubbles from the surface of the clear resin.
A janitor operates a floor buffer over the now solid, glossy surface.
The final shot shows a perfectly smooth, reflective floor with bottles suspended inside.
dialogue: [Sound of hundreds of glass bottles crashing and breaking]
[Deep roar of a propane torch flame]
[Mechanical hum of a floor polishing machine]
